Calculation.Text: /******************************************* * This function will take the fully qualified field name of the container field, and the new file name and will rename the file * that is contained in the container. Use in a set field command. * Because it uses the Base64 functions, it is a little slow, so it might be best * practice to Perform Script On Server. If the containers are compressed, you need to add a .gz to the end of the new file name * in order to make it work correctly. * * Parameters: Fully Qualified Field Name of Container (Table::Field), New Name of File * * Created 12/29/2014 - Mark Geerdes * ********************************************** */ Base64Decode ( Base64Encode ( FullyQualifiedFieldName ) ; NewFileName )
